summary: Razorpay Subscription Integration Testing Complete - All backend endpoints working. Frontend PlanUpgradeModal properly displays plans, triggers Razorpay checkout flow. Note: Razorpay checkout fails authentication because rzp_test_placeholder is not a valid key (expected behavior).

test_results.POST /api/subscription/create-order (sta: PASS - creates order with correct amount (49900 paise)
test_results.POST /api/subscription/create-order (gro: PASS - creates order with correct amount (199900 paise)

critical_code_review_comments: PlanUpgradeModal correctly implements Razorpay SDK loading via useEffect
handleSubscribe properly creates order -> opens Razorpay checkout -> verifies payment
Backend payments.py has proper test mode detection and mock order creation
Frontend uses correct data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Error handling in place for SDK not loaded and payment failures
test_credentials: Test users created dynamically with pattern test_*@test.com
seed_data_creation: Test users and payment orders created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay subscription integration fully tested. Backend endpoints /api/subscription/create-order and /api/subscription/verify-payment work correctly. Frontend PlanUpgradeModal triggers full payment flow. Note: Razorpay checkout will fail authentication with placeholder keys (rzp_test_placeholder) - this is expected. Real API keys need to be added to backend/.env (RAZORPAY_KEY_ID and RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET) for actual payments.

mocked_apis.razorpay_payments: MOCKED - Using test mode with placeholder keys (rzp_test_placeholder). Orders are created as mock orders in backend. Razorpay checkout opens but fails authentication because placeholder key is not valid. Real payments require adding RAZORPAY_KEY_ID and RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET to backend/.env

features_verified.verify_payment_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/subscription/verify-payment verifies and upgrades plan
features_verified.subscribe_triggers_razorpay: PASS - Opens Razorpay checkout (fails auth with placeholder key)
